brief_description: A powerful cordless vacuum cleaner with laser dust detection, acoustic dust analysis, and intelligent suction optimization.

quick_start.title: Connect Wand and Cleaner Head
quick_start.description: Insert the wand into the vacuum body until it clicks, then attach the Laser Slim Fluffy or Digital Motorbar cleaner head to the other end.

quick_start.title: Charge the Device
quick_start.description: Place the device on the wall-mounted dock or plug the charger directly into the charging port at the rear of the handle. Fully charge before first use (approx. 4.5 hours).

quick_start.title: Power On & Select Mode
quick_start.description: Pull the red trigger to start vacuuming. Press the silver selection button below the LCD screen to switch between Eco, Auto/Med, and Boost modes.

quick_start.title: Empty the Bin
quick_start.description: When dirt reaches the MAX mark, push the red bin release button and pull the handle down firmly to open the trapdoor and release dirt.

features.title: Laser Dust Detection (Laser Detect)
features.description: A precisely-angled laser on the cleaner head makes invisible dust visible on hard floors, guiding your deep clean.
operation_steps: Attach the Laser Slim Fluffy cleaner head to the wand.
Pull the power trigger; the green laser light will automatically illuminate the floor ahead.
Slide the green switch on the cleaner head to turn the laser light on or off.
precautions: The laser is Class 1, but avoid staring directly into the light source for extended periods.
The laser head is designed for hard floors. Use the Digital Motorbar head for carpets.
features.support_info: If the laser does not light up, check the connection or wipe the lens gently with a dry, lint-free microfiber cloth.

features.title: LCD Screen & Dust Statistics
features.description: A piezo sensor continuously sizes and counts dust particles, showing live colored statistics on the LCD screen.
operation_steps: Observe the four colored bar charts on the LCD screen representing tiny, medium, large, and extra-large particles.
Use Auto mode to let the device automatically adjust suction power based on dust volume.
precautions: Avoid dropping objects on the LCD screen or exposing it to water.
Statistics reset automatically when you connect to a charger or hold the selection button.
features.support_info: If the display is blank or frozen, remove and reinsert the battery pack to reboot the screen.

features.title: Digital Motorbar Cleaner Head
features.description: High-torque brush bar that automatically adapts suction power across carpets and hard floors with anti-tangle detangling vanes.
operation_steps: Connect the Digital Motorbar cleaner head and select Auto mode.
Adjust the red slider on the front of the head to control suction intake for deep-pile carpets.
precautions: Long pet hairs might occasionally require manual cleanup from the brush roll.
Avoid vacuuming large glass shards or liquids to prevent motor damage.
features.support_info: If the motor stops spinning due to a blockage, clear the obstruction and check the LCD screen for instructions.

faults.symptom: Vacuum pulsates (turns on and off rapidly) with no suction
faults.cause: Airflow is restricted by a blockage or dirty filter.
faults.solution:
1. Release trigger immediately.
2. Check wand, inlet, and cleaner head for physical blockages.
3. Wash the filter and let it dry for 24 hours.

faults.cause: Filter pores are filled with fine dust, blocking airflow.
faults.solution:
1. Twist the filter counter-clockwise to remove.
2. Wash under cold running water until clean, then shake to remove excess water.
3. Let dry for at least 24 hours in a warm, ventilated space.

faults.symptom: Red light flashing on battery side, device dead
faults.cause: Critical battery cell hardware fault or overheating.
faults.solution:
1. Unplug the charger and let the battery cool down for 30 minutes.
2. If it continues flashing red, contact Dyson Customer Service for a replacement battery.
